title: Gradient Clouds
description: Resource Pack that gives clouds a transparent gradient, like Story Mode
body:
## Gradient Clouds

Uses core shaders to give the clouds a vertical transparency gradient, like how Minecraft: Story Mode depicts them!

![Vanilla minecraft clouds with a vertical gradient from opaque to clear, starting from the bottom face and ending at the top face.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad00ce108c0927033a61640f96fd24f8c8e50b0c_0.webp)

The transition starts at the bottom when you're below the clouds, and it starts at the top when you're above them. There's a smooth transition between these two 'modes' when you pass through the cloud height.

The "Clouds" setting in video settings must be set to "Fancy" in order to see the change.
